label: Issue
description: Defines an ideological issue that groups related precepts.

allowMultiplePrecepts.label: Allow multiple precepts
allowMultiplePrecepts.description: If true, an ideology can contain more than one precept for this issue.

forceWriteLabelInPreceptFloatMenuOption.label: Force write label in precept float menu option
forceWriteLabelInPreceptFloatMenuOption.description: If true, the precept add-menu option writes the issue label even when it would normally be omitted.

iconPath.label: Icon path
iconPath.description: Texture path loaded for the issue icon.

basic-issue.label: Basic issue
basic-issue.description: Minimal ideological issue with a label and optional icon path.
